allow: PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File','tools/serve.ps1','-Port','8182','-Root','C:\\Users\\david\\Claude\\Projects\\Claude Wrestling\\preview' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\david\\Claude\\Projects\\Claude Wrestling' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest 'http://localhost:8182/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest 'http://localhost:8182/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "OK $\($r.StatusCode\) bytes=$\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8182 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 LocalAddress,LocalPort,State)

PowerShell($procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='powershell.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'serve\\.ps1' -and $_.CommandLine -match '8182' }; if \($procs\) { $procs | ForEach-Object { "Killing PID $\($_.ProcessId\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force } } else { "no serve.ps1 8182 process found" }; "--- remaining serve.ps1 processes ---"; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='powershell.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'serve\\.ps1' } | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='Port';e={ if\($_.CommandLine -match '-Port\\s+\(\\d+\)'\){$matches[1]} }} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)
